# Liam Karlsson

Liam Karlsson is a Swedish entrepreneur born in 2005, co-founder and CEO of Rankad.ai and founder of LK Innovations AB, based in Laholm, Sweden.
This site is his personal portfolio for employers, investors, clients, and collaborators who want to understand who he is, what he has built, and how to reach him.

## Key concepts
- Liam Karlsson: Swedish entrepreneur born 2005. Co-founder of Rankad.ai. Founder of LK Innovations AB. Selected Founder in Residence at The Residency, San Francisco 2026.
- Rankad.ai: An autonomous AI Search Optimization platform co-founded by Liam Karlsson. Helps brands become the recommended answer inside ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity on autopilot. Selected into The Residency, San Francisco in 2026 out of 3,500+ global applicants. Featured in Breakit.
- LK Innovations AB: A Swedish web agency founded by Liam Karlsson in March 2024. Has delivered 50+ websites and SEO projects for clients. Up to +1100% traffic growth achieved. 4.6 Trustpilot rating. Based in Laholm, Sweden. Org number: 559537-5758.
- The Residency: An elite San Francisco founder program. Liam was selected in February 2026 as one of 25 founders from 3,500+ global applicants, building Rankad.ai during the program.
- Web Development: Liam builds websites with React, Next.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, PHP, and MySQL.
- IT Security: Liam is currently enrolled in the IT Security Specialist programme at Teknikhögskolan (2025–2027). Former Account Manager & IT Support Specialist at Axami Systems AB.
- Futures Trading: Liam managed $80K+ in funded trading capital with Topstep, achieving ~60% win rate in NASDAQ and S&P 500 futures.
- AEO: Answer Engine Optimization — the practice of optimizing content and technical signals so that AI assistants like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity recommend a brand in their answers.

## Primary use cases
- Understanding who Liam Karlsson is and what he has built
- Evaluating Liam for investment, partnership, or startup collaboration related to Rankad.ai
- Hiring Liam or LK Innovations AB for web development, SEO, or digital marketing
- Contacting Liam for speaking engagements, media appearances, or consulting
- Reviewing Liam's technical skills, education, and certifications
